main.description: List the known repos that hold data in a space (the writer set), with each repo's current rev and commit hash. Served by the space host. This is the sync boundary, not an access-control list: it enumerates only writers, never readers. The set is what the authority claims from write notifications and is not itself authoritative; a repo's host is the source of truth.

limit.description: Maximum number of repos to return.

did.description: The DID of a repo that holds data in the space.

rev.description: The repo's current revision (TID), as last reported to the authority. May lag the repo host, which is the source of truth.

hash.description: The repo's current commit hash (sha256 of the LtHash state), as last reported to the authority.
